rules.rule_text:
rule RLStealer
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "RLStealer system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "==================================================" ascii
		$x2 = "ClipBoard :" ascii
		$x3 = "PC user :" ascii
		$x4 = "Current time :" ascii
		$x5 = "HWID :" ascii
		$x6 = "BSSID :" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
